summary: Tested three new competitive features for trucking GPS app: 1) Community Data Layer with user-contributed reports, 2) AI Crash/Incident Detection API, 3) Real Offline Maps with Service Worker tile pre-fetching. All features working correctly. Backend APIs verified via pytest (15/15 passed). Frontend UI verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Community sidebar tab navigates to CommunityView (data-testid='community-view')
VERIFIED: Community category filter buttons: parking, fuel_price, weigh_station, hazard, road_condition (data-testid='community-filter-{category}')
VERIFIED: Community Report button opens submit form (data-testid='community-submit-btn')
VERIFIED: Community submit form shows category buttons, quick presets, title input, location input, description input
VERIFIED: Community report submission works - filled title 'Test Parking Report', location 'I-80 Exit 50', submitted successfully
VERIFIED: Community live feed shows 6+ seeded reports with upvote buttons (7 upvote buttons found)
VERIFIED: Community upvote button increments count (data-testid starts with 'upvote-')
VERIFIED: Backend API: GET /api/community/reports returns JSON with reports array (4+ seeded reports)
VERIFIED: Backend API: POST /api/community/reports with {category:'hazard',title:'Test Hazard'} returns new report with id
VERIFIED: Backend API: POST /api/community/reports/:id/upvote increments upvotes
VERIFIED: Backend API: POST /api/crash-prediction with {bbox:'-87.6,41.8,-87.5,41.9'} returns JSON with incidentCount, aiPrediction.riskScore, incidents array
VERIFIED: Backend API: POST /api/crash-prediction without params returns 400 error
VERIFIED: Offline Maps view (data-testid='offline-maps-view') renders with storage summary
VERIFIED: Offline Maps shows (LIVE) label after Service Worker registers and downloads tiles
VERIFIED: Offline Maps download button (data-testid='download-region-us-midwest') is clickable and shows progress
VERIFIED: Offline Maps shows tile estimate for undownloaded regions (e.g., ~358 tiles (5.1 MB))
VERIFIED: All sidebar items render correctly: Dashboard, Navigation, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

seed_data_creation: 4 seeded community reports in /app/data/community_reports.json (parking, fuel_price, weigh_station, hazard)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new competitive features fully tested and working: 1) Community Data Layer - real-time trucker reports with categories (parking, fuel_price, weigh_station, hazard, road_condition), upvoting, and 4-hour TTL for hazard/weigh station reports. 2) AI Crash/Incident Detection - uses HERE Traffic API + Google Gemini for analysis, returns riskScore (1-10), warnings, recommendation, and estimated delay. Falls back to heuristic when Gemini unavailable. 3) Real Offline Maps - Service Worker tile pre-fetching using OSM tiles, shows (LIVE) label when SW registered, progress reporting via postMessage. All existing sidebar items verified working. Backend runs on port 8001 (combined Express+Vite). Preview URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com

community_view.details: Community View with data-testid='community-view' renders correctly with real-time trucker reports

community_filter_buttons.details: All 5 category filter buttons found and working: parking, fuel_price, weigh_station, hazard, road_condition

community_submit_form.details: Submit form opens with category buttons, quick presets, title/location/description inputs, and submit button

community_report_submission.details: Report submission works - new report appears in live feed after submission

community_upvote.details: Upvote buttons found (7 buttons) and clicking increments count

community_api_get_reports.details: GET /api/community/reports returns reports array with 4+ seeded reports

community_api_post_report.details: POST /api/community/reports creates new report with id, category, title, expiresAt

crash_prediction_api_bbox.details: POST /api/crash-prediction with bbox returns incidentCount, incidents array, aiPrediction with riskScore (1-10)

crash_prediction_api_route_coords.details: POST /api/crash-prediction with routeCoords returns valid prediction

offline_maps_view.details: Offline Maps View with data-testid='offline-maps-view' renders correctly

offline_maps_storage_summary.details: Storage summary shows Total Cached, Tiles, Regions with (LIVE) label when SW registered

offline_maps_download_buttons.details: All 5 US region download buttons found: us-midwest, us-south, us-northeast, us-west, us-southeast

offline_maps_tile_estimates.details: Tile estimates shown for undownloaded regions (e.g., ~358 tiles (5.1 MB))

offline_maps_download_progress.details: Download button clickable, shows progress, updates storage summary after completion

sidebar_all_items.details: All sidebar items render correctly: Dashboard, Navigation, Community, ELD Logs, Offline Maps, Display, Settings

mocked_apis.ai_crash_prediction: AI crash prediction falls back to heuristic when Gemini unavailable or no incidents found - returns calculated riskScore based on incident count
mocked_apis.offline_maps_sw: Service Worker may not fully register in headless browsers - OfflineMapsView handles this gracefully with fallback mode
